channel.title: What is the difference between Frontity Packages vs NextJs plugins vs Gatsby plugins?
channel.description:
One of the features of Frontity is its extensibility in the form of Frontity packages.
As a framework, what is the difference between [Frontity Packages](https://docs.frontity.org/api-reference-1) vs [NextJs plugins](https://github.com/vercel/next-plugins) vs [Gatsby plugins](https://www.gatsbyjs.com/plugins)?

item.title: What is the difference between Frontity Packages vs NextJs plugins vs Gatsby plugins?
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
One of the features of Frontity is its extensibility in the form of Frontity packages.

As a framework, what is the difference between Frontity Packages vs NextJs plugins vs Gatsby plugins?

Read full topic
item.source: What is the difference between Frontity Packages vs NextJs plugins vs Gatsby plugins?
